summary: V53.0 Decomposition Regression Test - PASSED. Verified UnifiedCreatorConsole.js decomposition from 1379→367 lines. All 10 mixer tool tabs work correctly (Orbit, Mix, Rec, Audio, Text, Layer, FX, AI, Out, Me). ParticleField 3D visualization renders in Orbit panel. All extracted panel components functional. Multi-route regression passed on /breathing, /meditation, /oracle, /star-chart.
context_for_next_testing_agent: V53.0 decomposition verified. UnifiedCreatorConsole.js now 367 lines with 16 extracted modules in /components/console/. All panel components work: TorusPanel (with ParticleField), MixPanel, RecordPanel, AudioPanel, TextPanel, OverlayPanel, EffectsPanel, AIPanel, ExportPanel, AccountPanel. PILLARS has 7 keys: practice, divination, sanctuary, body, wisdom, sage, cosmos (62 total modules). MixerNavBar has 10 tabs. Account panel shows Guest state correctly when not logged in.
